faq.question: Which replacement window materials can I compare at Deluxe Windows?
faq.answer: Homeowners can compare vinyl, wood, wood-clad, aluminum, aluminum-clad, fiberglass, and steel window options, subject to current manufacturer availability.

faq.question: How do I choose between window styles?
faq.answer: Choose an operating style by considering ventilation, egress, cleaning access, view area, furniture placement, architectural fit, and the dimensions of each opening.

faq.question: What determines replacement window energy performance?
faq.answer: Whole-window ratings depend on the frame, glass coatings, pane configuration, gas fill, spacers, weather seals, product size, and installation quality.

faq.question: How is installed window pricing calculated?
faq.answer: Installed window pricing depends on material, brand, style, dimensions, glass, finish, hardware, quantity, access, removal work, and permit or repair requirements.
